paper.title: Workspace-Bench 1.0: Benchmarking AI Agents on Workspace Tasks with Large-Scale File Dependencies

official_code_release.license_note: The root LICENSE is an MIT text whose copyright line says WOLF-Bench; provenance records the file as found and does not infer identity beyond the official repository snapshot.
official_code_release.relationship_to_paper: This official commit is dated 48 days after the immutable arXiv v4 update. It is release evidence, not the exact manuscript-time implementation, and must not be projected backward without corroboration.

lite.license_evidence: No license field appears in the pinned Hugging Face API metadata or dataset card. Do not infer a license from public accessibility or from the separately licensed full dataset.
lite.metadata_table_normalization: The tracked local CSV differs from the pinned remote object only by CRLF-to-LF newline normalization for repository diff hygiene.

official_datasets.release_timing_boundary: All pinned dataset revisions postdate arXiv v4. The Lite card documents July 2026 task-language, file, and rubric changes, so release artifacts must be compared to the paper rather than treated as manuscript-time identity.

inspection_scope: Downloaded and read the immutable arXiv v4 PDF and complete layout-preserving text through all 30 page boundaries. Downloaded and ZIP-tested the official pinned code archive; inspected its README, licensing, Docker envelope, runner, workspace copy/recovery, output collection, judge evidence view, and dependency-graph builder. Preserved revision-pinned API manifests and cards for the full, Lite, and workspace datasets, plus the complete 100-row English Lite metadata table with 1,850 rubrics and 783 dependency edges. Downloaded pinned English Lite task 3 metadata and all 37 task-local input files under task-3-trace/, with aggregate provenance in task-3-trace-manifest.json. The full task binaries, multi-gigabyte base workspace ZIPs, manuscript-time code, result trajectories/judgments, and human artifacts were not mirrored locally.
review_boundary: Deep review completed at papers/agent-benchmarks/2026-07-10-workspace-bench-file-dependency-validity.md. Code/dataset evidence postdates arXiv v4 and is not treated as manuscript-time identity. No end-to-end replay, professional-quality, human-ceiling, Lite-fidelity, or stable leaderboard claim is made.

targeted_task_trace.scope: Pinned post-v4 metadata plus all task-local inputs; excludes the base workspace, candidate output, execution trace, grader result, and human artifact.
